narrative.when: 周三晚上七点，舞蹈班第一次上课
narrative.where: 社区活动中心的舞蹈室
narrative.who: 甲（学员）· 乙（舞蹈老师）
narrative.how: 跟着老师的示范一步步练习
narrative.method: 老师示范舞步、跟着练习数拍子、纠正动作、完成一小段表演
narrative.event: 甲下个月有个聚会想表演一支舞，今天是第一次学

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good evening, ready to start?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, a bit on edge.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No need. First, watch my steps.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will keep my eyes on you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Left foot, then right. Like this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. Go slow.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now you have a go. One, two, three.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One, two, three... Is this right?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good, but keep your back straight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. Like this?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now let us do the full steps with music.
turns.zh: 现在跟着音乐跳完整支舞。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I hope I do not go wrong.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You will be all right. Take your time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One, two, three, four. Turn, then stop.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I did it! That was not so hard.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done! Now again, but with more feeling.
turns.zh: 做得好！再来一次，但带点感情。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: More feeling? Like a happy jump?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, see the happy time. You are the chief one.
turns.zh: 对，想想欢乐时光。你是主角。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will smile and move my arms.
turns.zh: 好。我会微笑，手臂也动起来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. And keep your head up. Ready?
turns.zh: 很好。头抬起来。准备好了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ready. One, two, three, four...

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Stop. Your turn was a bit late. Again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am sad. I will keep time better.
turns.zh: 抱歉。我会更好地把握时间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need for that. You are learning.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. Let me have another go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. From the top. One, two, three, four.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Left foot back, then turn. Keep your arms up.
turns.zh: 左脚后退，然后转。手臂保持抬起。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Like this? Am I doing it right?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Almost. You are a bit early. Keep time with the music.
turns.zh: 差不多。你有点早。跟上音乐的拍子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will keep still till the third time.
turns.zh: 我会保持不动，直到第三下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Again. One, two, three, turn. Good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was better. What about the arm move?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go smooth. Not quick. Like this, see?
turns.zh: 要流畅。别急。像这样，看到了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will make it soft. One, two, three...
turns.zh: 好的。我会做得柔和些。一、二、三……

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Much better. Now the last part. Smile.
turns.zh: 好多了。现在最后部分。微笑。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us do it from the top again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One, two, three, turn. Keep your arms soft.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is the way. Now turn round.
turns.zh: 对，就是这样。现在转一圈。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. You are getting it. One more time.
turns.zh: 不错。你掌握了。再来一次。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And that is all. Well done. You have it now.
turns.zh: 结束了。做得好。你现在会了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, do it with the music now?
turns.zh: 好，现在跟着音乐来一遍？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I am ready. Let me take a breath.
turns.zh: 好，我准备好了。让我喘口气。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Keep your eyes up, not on your feet.
turns.zh: 好。眼睛看前面，不要看脚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One, two, three, four. That was a bit quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take your time. One... two... three... four.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will go as you go. Again from the start.
turns.zh: 好的。我按你的速度来。从头再来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Better. Now turn on three. Yes.
turns.zh: 好多了。现在第三拍转身。对。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am getting the trick of it. This is a pleasure.
turns.zh: 我找到窍门了。挺有意思的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are doing well. One more time and we will have it.
turns.zh: 你做得不错。再来一次我们就完成了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let me put my water down first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ready? Music on three.
turns.zh: 准备好了吗？数到三放音乐。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One, two, three. Go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Step, step, turn. Good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am keeping my eyes up now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Arms out on the turn.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Like this?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A bit higher. There you go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is more natural now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Last eight moves. Keep with me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Five, six, seven, eight. And stop.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Now we do it with the music.
turns.zh: 好。现在我们跟着音乐来一遍。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One, two, three, four. Step, together, step.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Five, six, seven, eight. Turn and look.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am a bit slow on the turn.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. Keep the time. Again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Step, turn, look back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Like this? Am I turning too early?
turns.zh: 这样吗？我是不是转太早了？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A short time after. Keep time with the music.
turns.zh: 过一小会儿。跟上音乐的拍子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One, two, three, four. Turn on five.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Five, six, seven, eight. Yes, that is it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now the arms. Up on three, down on seven.
turns.zh: 现在手臂。三拍举起，七拍放下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Arms up. Good. Keep them soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more time from the top. Ready?
turns.zh: 从头再来一次。准备好了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, let us do it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, now the music again. This time you do it on your own.
turns.zh: 好，现在音乐再放一次。这次你一个人跳。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, all right. Here goes.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, one, two, three, four. Turn on five.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Five, six, seven, eight. That is it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Arms up on three. Down on seven.
turns.zh: 三拍手臂举起。七拍放下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You did it all the way through.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I did it! I am out of breath.
turns.zh: 我做到了！我喘不过气了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have some water. You did well for a first go.
turns.zh: 喝点水。第一次跳成这样不错了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. Same time seven days from now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. alright then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the right way.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope I do well at the get-together.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will. It is in your body now.
turns.zh: 你会的。动作已经在你身体里了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do it one more time?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, you have done enough for today.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I seem to be getting better.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are. Keep at it and you will be great.
turns.zh: 是的。坚持练，你会跳得很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for your help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My pleasure. See you after this week.

storyBlurb: 甲为下月聚会学舞，初次踏入舞室。老师耐心示范，甲笨拙跟练，最终完成一小段表演。
storyScript: 【收束·完成表演】乙重新播放音乐，这次让甲独自站在中央。灯光聚焦，甲深吸一口气，跟着拍子起步。右脚、左脚、转身、抬手——动作虽不完美，但连贯地完成了整段舞。最后一个音符落下时，甲微微喘气，嘴角不自觉上扬。乙鼓起掌来，空旷的舞室里回响着清脆的掌声。甲走到墙边拿起水瓶，喝了一口温水，看着镜子里自己泛红的脸颊。乙走过来，拍了拍她的肩，说下周同一时间继续。甲点点头，心里已经开始期待下一次练习。
